title: Conduct of Surveillance. The Department motu proprio, through the
content: 33 MWPB and the Regional Offices may conduct investigation and surveillance on alleged 34 illegal recruitment activities, trafficking in person cases, or recruitment violations. 35 36 For this purpose, the Department may seek the assistance of law enforcement authorities 37 in the conduct of surveillance. 38 39 Upon the termination of surveillance operations, a report supported by affidavits and other 40 evidence shall be submitted to the MWPB Director or the Regional Director, as the case 41 may be. 42 43

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
